electricity_nmi_meters_23249 = False
Run the get_feature_flags Notebook to fetch all Feature Flags from the Unify database
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType,
    StructField,
    StringType,
    IntegerType,
    BooleanType,
    DateType,
    DoubleType,
    TimestampType,
    DecimalType
)

from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col,
    concat,
    concat_ws,
    explode,
    lit,
    to_timestamp,
    current_timestamp,
    date_format,
    regexp_replace,
    sha2,
    hash
)

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError
from py4j.java_gateway import java_import

db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_MSATS_Landing"
lake_db_name = "aemo_bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Bronze_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_bronze =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_bronze:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create msats_raw Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "msats_raw" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/msats_raw")

def execute_raw_sql(db_query):
    
    db_port = 1433
    linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
    linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
    sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
    db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
    access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

    jdbc_url = f"jdbc:sqlserver://{sql_server_name}:1433;database={db_name};encrypt=true;hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net"
    java_import(spark._sc._gateway.jvm, "java.util.Properties")

    # Create Java Properties object
    props = spark._sc._gateway.jvm.Properties()
    props.setProperty("accessToken", access_token)
    props.setProperty("driver", "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver")
    
    # Establish a JDBC connection
    connection = spark._sc._gateway.jvm.java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(jdbc_url, props)
    
    # Create a cursor object
    statement = connection.createStatement()

    # Pass in Query 
    statement.execute(db_query) 

    connection.commit()
    statement.close()
    connection.close()

import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

# Return the text inside <ReportName> tag
def extract_report_name(xml_path: str) -> str:
    try:
        # Read file as text using Spark
        lines = spark.read.text(xml_path).rdd.map(lambda r: r[0]).collect()
        content = "\n".join(lines)

        # Parse XML
        root = ET.fromstring(content)

        # Recursively search for <ReportName> tag
        for elem in root.iter():
            if elem.tag == "ReportName":
                return elem.text  # Return the text inside <ReportName>

        return None  # If not found
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Failed to extract report name from {xml_path}: {e}")
        return None

# Table: **msats_nmi_data_raw**: START
#Set table name
db_tablename_nmi_data="msats_nmi_data_raw"

#Create _raw table in Bronze layer
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename_nmi_data}
(
	SequenceNumber STRING,
	CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
	RowStatus STRING,
	FromDate TIMESTAMP,
	ToDate TIMESTAMP,
	NMI STRING,
	JurisdictionCode STRING,
	NMIClassificationCode STRING,
	TransmissionNodeIdentifier STRING,
	TransmissionNodeIdentifier2 STRING,
	DistributionLossFactorCode STRING,
	ParentEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier STRING,
	ChildEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier STRING,
	BuildingOrPropertyName STRING,
	LotNumber STRING,
	FlatOrUnitNumber STRING,
	FlatOrUnitType STRING,
	FloorOrLevelNumber STRING,
	FloorOrLevelType STRING,
	HouseNumber STRING,	
	HouseNumberSuffix STRING,
	HouseNumberTo STRING,
	HouseNumberToSuffix STRING,
	StreetName STRING,
	StreetType STRING,
	StreetSuffix STRING,
	SuburbOrPlaceOrLocality STRING,
	LocationDescriptor STRING,
	StateOrTerritory STRING,
	PostCode STRING,
	GNAFPID STRING,
	DeliveryPointIdentifier STRING,
	Aggregate STRING,
	FeederClass STRING,
	Status STRING,
	CustomerClassificationCode STRING,
	CustomerThresholdCode STRING,
	LastConsumerChangeDate DATE,
	SharedIsolationPointFlag STRING,
	ConnectionConfiguration STRING,
	MeterMalfunctionExemptionNumber  STRING,
	MeterMalfunctionExemptionExpiryDate DATE,
	FileName STRING,
    ParticipantId STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_data}'

if electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    #Create _raw table in Bronze layer
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename_nmi_meters}
    (
        SequenceNumber STRING,
        CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
        MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
        RowStatus STRING,
        FromDate TIMESTAMP,
        ToDate TIMESTAMP,
        NMI STRING,
        SerialNumber STRING,
        Location STRING,
        Hazard STRING,
        InstallationTypeCode STRING,
        Use STRING,
        Manufacturer STRING,
        Model STRING,
        LastTestDate DATE,
        TestResult STRING,
        ReadTypeCode STRING,
        NextScheduledReadDate DATE,
        Status STRING,
        CurrentTransformerType STRING,
        CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable STRING,
        CurrentTransformerRatioConnected STRING,
        CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass STRING,
        CurrentTransformerTest STRING,
        CurrentTransformerTestDate DATE,
        CurrentTransformerLocation STRING,
        VoltageTransformerType STRING,
        VoltageTransformerRatio STRING,
        VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass STRING,
        VoltageTransformerTest STRING,
        VoltageTransformerTestDate DATE,
        VoltageTransformerLocation STRING,
        Latitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
        Longitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
        FileName STRING,
        ParticipantId STRING
    )
    USING delta
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_meters}'
    """)

else:
	print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
# Table: **msats_nmi_meters_raw**: END

if electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")

    from datetime import datetime

    # Process MSATS/CATS files and put them in raw 
    files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}")

    for f in files:
        if f.name.endswith(".xml"):
            ReportName = extract_report_name(f.path)
            #print(f"{f.name} → ReportName: {ReportName}")
            file_name = f.name

            if ReportName == "Master":
                print(f"Processing {f.name} with ReportName: {ReportName}")

                # Read and process XML
                df = spark.read.format("xml") \
                    .option("rowTag", "Transaction") \
                    .load(f.path)

                # Extract Participant value from ReportParameters
                participant_df = df.select(col("ReportResponse.ReportParameters.Participant").alias("Participant"))

                # Collect the value into a Python variable
                participant_df_filtered = participant_df.filter(col("Participant").isNotNull())
                participant_id = participant_df_filtered.first()["Participant"]

                # Check if ReportResults exists
                if not has_nested_field(df.schema, "ReportResponse.ReportResults"):
                    print(f"File {f.name} missing <ReportResults>, skipping file.")
                    execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES (FileName,ErrorMessage,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}',' missing <ReportResults> tag data','{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}');")
                    continue

                # Check if ReplicationBlock exists
                if not has_nested_field(df.schema, "ReportResponse.ReportResults.ReplicationBlock"):
                    print(f"File {f.name} missing <ReplicationBlock>, skipping file.")
                    execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES (FileName,ErrorMessage,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}','missing <ReplicationBlock> tag data','{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}');")
                    continue

                # Explode ReplicationBlock
                df_blocks = df.select(
                    explode(col("ReportResponse.ReportResults.ReplicationBlock")).alias("ReplicationBlock")
                )

                # Loop through each table
                for table_name, schema in table_schemas.items():
                    try:
                        # Filter blocks matching the table
                        df_table = df_blocks.filter(
                            col("ReplicationBlock._tableName") == table_name
                        )

                        # If table exists in XML
                        if df_table.count() > 0:

                            # Explode the array of rows so each becomes a separate record
                            df_rows = df_table.select(explode(col("ReplicationBlock.Row")).alias("Row"))

                            # Flatten the Row struct including nested fields
                            flattened_fields = flatten_struct(df_rows.schema["Row"].dataType)

                            # Build select expressions using full paths
                            select_exprs = []
                            
                            for f in schema.fields:
                                # Try to find a matching flattened field path that ends with the schema field name
                                match = next((path for path, alias in flattened_fields if alias == f.name), None)
                                if match:
                                    select_exprs.append(col(match).alias(f.name))
                                else:
                                    select_exprs.append(lit(None).cast(f.dataType).alias(f.name))

                            df_normalized = df_rows.select(*select_exprs)
                            df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("FileName",lit(file_name))
                            df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("ParticipantId",lit(participant_id))                     

                            if table_name == "ElectricityNMIMaster":
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("SequenceNumber", col("SequenceNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("NMI", col("NMI").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("LotNumber", col("LotNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("FlatOrUnitNumber", col("FlatOrUnitNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("FloorOrLevelNumber", col("FloorOrLevelNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("HouseNumber", col("HouseNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("HouseNumberTo", col("HouseNumberTo").cast(StringType()))  
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("PostCode", col("PostCode").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("DeliveryPointIdentifier", col("DeliveryPointIdentifier").cast(StringType()))

                                output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_data}"
                                df_normalized.write.format("delta").mode("append").option("mergeSchema","true").option("path", output_path).save()

                            if table_name == "ElectricityNMIRoles":
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("SequenceNumber", col("SequenceNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("NMI", col("NMI").cast(StringType()))

                                output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_role}"
                                df_normalized.write.format("delta").mode("append").option("mergeSchema","true").option("path", output_path).save()

                            if table_name == "ElectricityNMIMeters":
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("SequenceNumber", col("SequenceNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("NMI", col("NMI").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("SerialNumber", col("SerialNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("Latitude", col("Latitude").cast(DecimalType(10, 7)))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("Longitude", col("Longitude").cast(DecimalType(10, 7)))

                                output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_meters}"
                                df_normalized.write.format("delta").mode("append").option("mergeSchema","true").option("path", output_path).save()
                                
                        else:
                            print(f"Table '{table_name}' not found in XML — skipping.")

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"Error processing table {table_name}: {str(e)}")

            else:
                print(f"Skipping {f.name}: ReportName is {ReportName}")  

else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

    from datetime import datetime 

    # Process MSATS/CATS files and put them in raw 
    files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}")

    for f in files:
        if f.name.endswith(".xml"):
            ReportName = extract_report_name(f.path)
            #print(f"{f.name} → ReportName: {ReportName}")
            file_name = f.name

            if ReportName == "Master":
                print(f"Processing {f.name} with ReportName: {ReportName}")

                # Read and process XML
                df = spark.read.format("xml") \
                    .option("rowTag", "Transaction") \
                    .load(f.path)

                # Extract Participant value from ReportParameters
                participant_df = df.select(col("ReportResponse.ReportParameters.Participant").alias("Participant"))

                # Collect the value into a Python variable
                participant_df_filtered = participant_df.filter(col("Participant").isNotNull())
                participant_id = participant_df_filtered.first()["Participant"]

                # Check if ReportResults exists
                if not has_nested_field(df.schema, "ReportResponse.ReportResults"):
                    print(f"File {f.name} missing <ReportResults>, skipping file.")
                    execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES (FileName,ErrorMessage,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}',' missing <ReportResults> tag data','{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}');")
                    continue

                # Check if ReplicationBlock exists
                if not has_nested_field(df.schema, "ReportResponse.ReportResults.ReplicationBlock"):
                    print(f"File {f.name} missing <ReplicationBlock>, skipping file.")
                    execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES (FileName,ErrorMessage,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}','missing <ReplicationBlock> tag data','{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}');")
                    continue

                # Explode ReplicationBlock
                df_blocks = df.select(
                    explode(col("ReportResponse.ReportResults.ReplicationBlock")).alias("ReplicationBlock")
                )

                # Loop through each table
                for table_name, schema in table_schemas.items():
                    try:
                        # Filter blocks matching the table
                        df_table = df_blocks.filter(
                            col("ReplicationBlock._tableName") == table_name
                        )

                        # If table exists in XML
                        if df_table.count() > 0:

                            # Explode the array of rows so each becomes a separate record
                            df_rows = df_table.select(explode(col("ReplicationBlock.Row")).alias("Row"))

                            # Flatten the Row struct including nested fields
                            flattened_fields = flatten_struct(df_rows.schema["Row"].dataType)

                            # Build select expressions using full paths
                            select_exprs = []
                            
                            for f in schema.fields:
                                # Try to find a matching flattened field path that ends with the schema field name
                                match = next((path for path, alias in flattened_fields if alias == f.name), None)
                                if match:
                                    select_exprs.append(col(match).alias(f.name))
                                else:
                                    select_exprs.append(lit(None).cast(f.dataType).alias(f.name))

                            df_normalized = df_rows.select(*select_exprs)
                            df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("FileName",lit(file_name))
                            df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("ParticipantId",lit(participant_id))                     

                            if table_name == "ElectricityNMIMaster":
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("SequenceNumber", col("SequenceNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("NMI", col("NMI").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("LotNumber", col("LotNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("FlatOrUnitNumber", col("FlatOrUnitNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("FloorOrLevelNumber", col("FloorOrLevelNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("HouseNumber", col("HouseNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("HouseNumberTo", col("HouseNumberTo").cast(StringType()))  
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("PostCode", col("PostCode").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("DeliveryPointIdentifier", col("DeliveryPointIdentifier").cast(StringType()))

                                output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_data}"
                                df_normalized.write.format("delta").mode("append").option("mergeSchema","true").option("path", output_path).save()

                            if table_name == "ElectricityNMIRoles":
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("SequenceNumber", col("SequenceNumber").cast(StringType()))
                                df_normalized = df_normalized.withColumn("NMI", col("NMI").cast(StringType()))

                                output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename_nmi_role}"
                                df_normalized.write.format("delta").mode("append").option("mergeSchema","true").option("path", output_path).save()
                                
                        else:
                            print(f"Table '{table_name}' not found in XML — skipping.")

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"Error processing table {table_name}: {str(e)}")

            else:
                print(f"Skipping {f.name}: ReportName is {ReportName}")
